seo.title: Sweet Mustard - 3 ingredients - you'll never look back. - Marinda Kook

html:
Look, there are recipes that come down from generation to generation. This mustard is one of them. You can eat it with pork, cold meat or potato salad. Also lovely on your cheeseboard. This mustard is so tasty and versatile. The strength of the mustard depends on the amount of mustard powder you put in. My 20 ml gives it just a lovely bite.

 

INGREDIENTS:

  • 1 tin condensed milk
  • 140 ml vinegar (a half cup and a little extra)
  • 20 ml mustard powder ( 4 teaspoons)

NOW:

Throw everything together and stir/ whisk well. Put it in a plastic tub in the fridge until you need it.

 

This mustard is really deeply delicious. Believe me, it truly is!
